$comment: Smoke-test artifact from Gate 4 Step 1.5 (autonomous Rule 16). Captures the Read-tool native PDF extraction of Notes/MCFIRST SENTENCE : REBUTTAL.pdf at 2026-04-30. MCFIRST is authoritative for the canonical 20; spec.html L2493-2507 listing had drift in 5 titles. Step 2 wires pdfjs-dist to reproduce this output programmatically.
extractor: Read-tool native PDF text extraction (text-based PDF; no OCR required)

questions.anomaly_resolved: Spec L2503 said 'Apatosaurus / galloping' — that stimulus lives in Netlify/index (6).html paraphrased, not MCFIRST. MCFIRST Q10 is the legislators / molds stimulus.

questions.title_resolved: Q11 was untitled in spec; MCFIRST extraction supplies title.

questions.title: Witnessing violence in movies / rhetorical-question rebuttal
questions.title_resolved: Q12 was untitled in spec; MCFIRST extraction supplies title. Note: 2-sentence stimulus ending in rhetorical question.

questions.title: Multinational grain companies / food-distribution / since-clause leading
questions.anomaly_resolved: Spec L2506 said 'Mr. Tannisch / fingerprints / gloves' AND 'Rebuttal' — both wrong. MCFIRST Q20 is multinational grain companies AND First-sentence (since-clause is support; main clause is conclusion). Mr. Tannisch stimulus not present in MCFIRST; orphaned — will surface to Joshua at Module 4 build start if intended for v1 simulator.
